corrections.text: The article's Overview states that 'Shares opened at $30.11 — a 36 percent gain over the $23 offering price.' According to Invezz, the $30.11 opening price represented approximately a 31 percent gain over the $23 IPO price; the 36 percent figure refers to the intraday trading session high of $31.33. The 36 percent gain cited in the headline and summary correctly describes the session-high return, but the Overview paragraph incorrectly maps it to the opening price.
